# Gestion Velora - Property Management in Montreal

Gestion Velora provides property management services in Montreal, Quebec for condo boards, Airbnb short-term rentals, and long-term rental properties. The site includes service pages, FAQ content, and practical blog explainers on compliance, reserve funds, NOI, and operations.

## Official Sources
- Home (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/
- Home (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/
- Services hub (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/services
- Services hub (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/services
- Blog (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog
- Blog (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog
- Privacy: https://www.gestionvelora.com/privacy

## Markdown Sources (AI-friendly)
- Home summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/home.md
- Services hub summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/services.md
- Condo service summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/service-syndicat-copropriete.md
- Airbnb service summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/service-airbnb.md
- Long-term rental service summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/service-location.md
- Blog hub summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/blog.md
- Privacy summary (FR/EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/md/privacy.md

## Core Service Pages
- Condo management (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/services/syndicat-copropriete - Administration, governance, reserve-fund planning, maintenance coordination, owner communication.
- Condo management (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/services/syndicat-copropriete - Full condo board operations and compliance support in Montreal.
- Airbnb management (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/services/airbnb - Listings, pricing, operations, permits/compliance, guest communication.
- Airbnb management (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/services/airbnb - End-to-end short-term rental management with operational controls.
- Long-term rental management (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/services/location - Tenant screening, rent collection, maintenance, lease lifecycle support.
- Long-term rental management (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/services/location - Professional long-term property operations for stable occupancy and cash flow.

## High-Value Insight Articles
- Smart property management trends (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog/avenir-gestion-immobiliere-intelligente-2026 - Data, automation, and transparency trends for 2026.
- Smart property management trends (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog/avenir-gestion-immobiliere-intelligente-2026 - 2026 market and operational shifts for owners and boards.
- Preventive maintenance (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog/maintenance-preventive-economise-millions - Why planned maintenance reduces emergency costs.
- Preventive maintenance (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog/maintenance-preventive-economise-millions - Cost and risk impact of proactive building upkeep.
- Optimize NOI (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog/maximiser-noi-approche-donnees - Data-driven operational levers for better NOI.
- Optimize NOI (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog/maximiser-noi-approche-donnees - Monthly metrics and decision frameworks for NOI.
- Condo regulation in Montreal (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog/gestion-copropriete-montreal-reglementation - Quebec condo law and governance requirements.
- Condo regulation in Montreal (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog/gestion-copropriete-montreal-reglementation - Practical regulatory checklist for boards.
- Airbnb permits and rules (FR): https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog/airbnb-montreal-permis-reglementation - Municipal and operational compliance for short-term rentals.
- Airbnb permits and rules (EN): https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/blog/airbnb-montreal-permis-reglementation - Rules, taxes, and risk reduction basics.

## Structured Data Coverage
- Organization + WebSite on homepage.
- FAQPage on homepage.
- ItemList on services hub.
- Service on each service detail page.
- Article on each blog post.
